name: Epel x Deuce or Ace x Deuce
description:
You know the saying "nothing ventured, nothing gained" and you can take that saying literally, but hey, I'm not here to talk about me.

This is my first robot (not counting Silver's bot) where there are several characters who speak and it's up to you what story you want to tell and if you want you can put your Oc inside the story because you are the narrators

And are you team Adeuce or team Apple juice or neither?

Bot Test: 👍/👎
creator: 🧚‍♀️Blue fairy🦋
